en-us.html:
This is why you're supposed to read the map...

Story

393 AC - I grab Bubbles' fin to let him pull me along, because there's not a single second to waste. On the ledge, the three Eidolons already need to hold on tight to avoid being swept away by the surge. Zaza and I had warned everyone that this place was dangerous! At regular intervals, gravity currents would grab hold of the water that had accumulated on the archipelagos to form the huge water spheres of the Thermaic Quadrant. But it seemed like not everyone had listened, or even read the map! Even way up here, I can see the Three Little Pigs fighting as hard as they can to avoid getting sucked in. They've discarded their bags, packs and cumbersome gear, but it doesn't seem to be enough…

Deep down, I know they're just Eidolons and don't really fear anything – except remembering a really bad experience and having it become a habit for them. But we're an Exalt now, and that changes everything. We need to act like heroes! What would Sigismar and Wingspan do? Or Kojo and Booda? They were my favorite duos. That's the question I asked myself before jumping in, and the answer was obvious: They would have jumped in without hesitation. That's why I needed to do the same, even if it meant I'd get a proper scolding later. After all, with great power comes great responsibility!

Narrator

NADIR

blocks.text: This is why you're supposed to read the map...

blocks.title: Story
paragraphs: 393 AC - I grab Bubbles' fin to let him pull me along, because there's not a single second to waste. On the ledge, the three Eidolons already need to hold on tight to avoid being swept away by the surge. Zaza and I had warned everyone that this place was dangerous! At regular intervals, gravity currents would grab hold of the water that had accumulated on the archipelagos to form the huge water spheres of the Thermaic Quadrant. But it seemed like not everyone had listened, or even read the map! Even way up here, I can see the Three Little Pigs fighting as hard as they can to avoid getting sucked in. They've discarded their bags, packs and cumbersome gear, but it doesn't seem to be enough…

Deep down, I know they're just Eidolons and don't really fear anything – except remembering a really bad experience and having it become a habit for them. But we're an Exalt now, and that changes everything. We need to act like heroes! What would Sigismar and Wingspan do? Or Kojo and Booda? They were my favorite duos. That's the question I asked myself before jumping in, and the answer was obvious: They would have jumped in without hesitation. fr-fr.html:
Voilà pourquoi il faut lire la carte...

Histoire

393 AC - J'attrape la nageoire de Bubbles pour me laisser entraîner, parce qu'il faut pas perdre une seule seconde. Déjà, sur la corniche, les trois Eidolons doivent se cramponner pour pas se faire emporter par la déferlante. Avec Zaza, on avait pourtant bien indiqué que le lieu était dangereux ! À intervalle régulier, des courants de gravité venaient subtiliser l'eau accumulée sur les archipels, pour constituer les grandes sphères d'eau du Quadrant Thermaïque. Mais il faut croire que certains n'ont pas écouté, ou n'ont pas bien lu la carte ! De tout là-haut, je vois les Trois Petits Cochons lutter comme ils peuvent pour pas être aspirés. Ils se sont débarrassés de leurs sacs et de leurs paquetages, délestés de leur matos méga-encombrant, mais ça semble clairement pas suffire...

Au fond de moi, je sais que ce sont que des Eidolons, et qu'ils craignent rien. Hormis de se souvenir d'une très mauvaise expérience et que ça devienne un schéma pour eux. Mais on est un Exalt, maintenant, et ça, ça change tout. On doit se comporter comme des héros ! Qu'est-ce que feraient Sigismar et Wingspan ? Et Kojo et Booda ? C'était mes duos préférés. C'est la question que je m'étais posée avant de me jeter dans le bain, et c'était clair qu'ils y seraient allés sans hésiter. C'est pour ça que je devais les imiter, même si on allait sûrement me passer un savon pour ça. Parce que là où il y avait un grand pouvoir, il y avait aussi une grande responsabilité !

Narré par

NADIR

blocks.text: Voilà pourquoi il faut lire la carte...

blocks.title: Histoire

Ils se sont débarrassés de leurs sacs et de leurs paquetages, délestés de leur matos méga-encombrant, mais ça semble clairement pas suffire...
